stemHtml:
Which choice accurately interprets the information provided in the METAR report for London Heathrow (EGLL)?

EGLL 141220Z 30020G30KT 270V330 5000 SHRA SCT005 BKN012CB 04/01 Q0999 RETS WS RW R27L BECMG 32010KT 9999 NSW SCT018.

options.a: The weather reported at 141220 UTC is showers of rain from 4 to 6 oktas of CB base 1200 ft above aerodrome level.
options.b: The information in the METAR indicates that a warm front is moving away from the airport after 141220 UTC.
options.c: The moderate precipitation reported at 141220 UTC is expected to stop during the next 2 hours.
options.d: The reported cloud ceiling at 141220 UTC is at 500 ft above aerodrome level.
